attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"message": "I have a model logged in MLflow. How do I deploy it as an API?", "turn": 1}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"response": "You can use MLflow's model serving. Register the model and then serve it with the mlflow models serve command."}

attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are an MLflow assistant."}, {"role": "user", "content": "I have a model logged in MLflow. How do I deploy it as an API?"}], "model": "claude-sonnet-4-5"}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"role": "assistant", "content": "You can use MLflow's model serving. Register the model and then serve it with the mlflow models serve command."}
